ddt:Target.Name: T4_VS_HFM_2_DDT_4_2
ddt:Target.Description:
The DDT 2000 file is auto generated by Power tool. (DEASIC4/65692/UET Modélisation BCM)
2009.09.30 - Creation
2017.03.22 - Rajout des écrans de pairing et des projets véhicules 2017.03.22 - Officialisation base HFM2

Data.Name: Additional pairing data MSB to LSB
After Sales Code MSB to LSB
CNT_WAC_STOP_BY_TIMEOUT_S
Data.Comment: Traceability RQT_SES_1.05.052_430_V4.8 ASIL A Description zeofjkzefojzefo

Item.Text: Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit High
Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit Low
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Low
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Range/Performance
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit High
signal has too few transitions / events
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
signal has too many transitions / events
circuit short to battery or open
circuit short to ground or open
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding/ General Failure Information
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
rep nok CID blank not the one pre-presented
rep nok storage of data NOK in CID
rep nok CID not belonging to the vehicle
rep nok CID already paired in this procedure of pairing
rep nok Only one Rest Access Card paired to the ECU
rep nok Configuration Restricted Access Card not ok
Transponder of the reader not available
pb storage pairing context in CID
Time out CID pairing in Key configuration
IGN OFF before end of pairing
rep nok storage of data NOK in CID
rep nok CID already paired in this procedure of pairing
rep nok Routine to pair Restricted Access Card whereas 1 already paired
rep nok Configuration Restricted Access Card not ok
Transponder of the reader not available
pb storage pairing context in CID
Time out CID pairing in Key configuration
IGN OFF before end of pairing
rep nok storage of data NOK in CID
rep nok CID blank for ECU pairing or CID not belonging to the vehicle for ECU or CID pairing
rep nok CID already paired in this procedure of pairing
rep nok Only one Rest Access Card paired to the ECU
rep nok Configuration Restricted Access Card not ok
Transponder of the reader not available
pb storage pairing context in CID
Time out CID pairing in Key configuration
IGN OFF before end of pairing

DataItem.Name: After Sales Code MSB to LSB
Additional pairing data MSB to LSB
After Sales Code MSB to LSB
Additional pairing data MSB to LSB
After Sales Code MSB to LSB
After Sales Code MSB to LSB
After Sales Code MSB to LSB

Screen.Name: Factory Genesis HFM and CIDs PAIRING

Label.Text: FACTORY IN LINE : GENESIS HFM and Customer IDs pairing
1) Complete the "additional pairing datas" (11 bytes= not mandatory) and press the button "ENTER GENESIS MODE"
2) If the GENESIS MODE is launched, then present a blank customer ID near central antenna ( to check that the customer ID is blank, press the button"CID blanking check")
3) Press the button "CID pairing" for each customer ID to pair
4) If the customer ID is paired, then insert a new customer ID in the reader and press "CID pairing"
5) Once all the customer IDs are paired, read the APV code and keep the value.

Input.DataName: Additional pairing data MSB to LSB

Screen.Name: Factory Rework Pairing : HFM or CID

Label.Text: FACTORY REWORK : HFM or Card pairing
1) Complete the "After Sales code" ( 16 bytes) then press "ENTER REWORK MODE"
2) If the REWORK MODE for HFM pairing is launched, then
4) Once all the customer IDs are paired, press the button "EXIT REWORK MODE"
CID ANALYSE - Select "StartRoutine" and press the button
3) Press "CID Pairing" to pair a card
2) If the REWORK MODE for customer ID pairing is launched, then
3) Press "HFM pairing" to pair the HFM
4) If the HFM is paired, the EXIT of the REWORK MODE is automatic. Then pair all the cards (procedure in right)
Approach a Card belonging to the vehicle to the transponder antenna
Approach a Card belonging to the vehicle, or blank, to the transponder antenna
Repeat 2 and 3 for each card to pair

Input.DataName: After Sales Code MSB to LSB
Additional pairing data MSB to LSB

Label.Text: FACTORY PAIRING of ESCL or ECM (Rework)
When the HFM and Card are paired and APV Code available, ESCL and ECM pairing in factory is done automatically on the first Ignition Power Supply ON
Protected Pairing : HFM pairing in After Sales
1) !! Check that you have access rights to the application "Pairing using DDT2000" on https://gco.intra.renault.fr:14053/gco/ctrl/login
3) Select "Input_Data_To_Server" (19 bytes) and copy it in the application "Pairing using DDT2000".
4) Get the "Server answer" (16 bytes) and copy it in this screen. Then press "Transmit Server Answer"
5) If the HFM is SA unlocked for HFM pairing then :
CID ANALYSE - Select "startRoutine" and press the button
Pairing procedure exit is automatic. If the HFM is not SA unlocked , press ABORT
approach the card belonging to the vehicle to the pairing antenna and press "HFM Pairing"
Protected Pairing : Card pairing in After Sales
1) Approach the card to the transponder antenna and press the button "Card Analyse" to check its presence and status
2) Complete PARAMETER_CID_PAIRING with blank IDE (8 bytes, IDE1;IDE2) and press "Request Server CID pairing"
3) Select the "SENDKEY_RESPONSE" (19 bytes) and copy it in the application "Pairing using DDT2000".
5) Complete the "Additional pairing data" (optional) get the "Server Answer" from "Pairing DDT2000" and press "Transmit Server Answer"
6) If the BCM is SA unlocked for card pairing, approach a blank Card to the antenna and press the button "CID pairing"
7) Repeat Step 6 for all Card to pair
Card ANALYSE - Select "startRoutine" and press the button
8) If all Cards are paired, press "Exit procedure"
!! Check that you have access rights to the application "Pairing using DDT2000" on https://gco.intra.renault.fr:14053/gco/ctrl/login
Protected Pairing : Electrical Steering Column Locked pairing in After Sales
2) Check that the HFM is not blank and the ESCL is blank (try to start the vehicle) and read the ESCL information "SteeringLock Blanck/coded"
4) Select the "Input_Data_to_Server" (19 bytes) and copy it in the application "Pairing using DDT2000".
5) Complete the frames in the application and press the button "Calcul".Get the "Server answer" (16 bytes) and copy it in this screen. Then press the button "Transmit Server Answer"
6) If the BCM is SA unlocked for ESCL pairing, then put the Ignition OFF, select "startRoutine" and press the button "Authorize ESCL pairing"
7) If the authorization to pair is ok, then put the Ignition ON. If the ESCL is paired ( "blank_coded = false") the exit of the procedure is automatic.
8) To postpone the authorization to pair the ESCL, press the button
1) !! Check that you have access rights to the application "Pairing using DDT2000" on https://gco.intra.renault.fr:14053/gco/ctrl/login
Engine Control Module: After Sales Protected Pairing
2) Check that the ECM is blank (try to start the vehicle) and read the ECM information " ECM_IS_BLANK"
3) Press the button "Request Server ECM pairing"
4) Select the "Input_Data_to_server" (19 bytes) and copy it in the application "Pairing using DDT2000".
5) Complete the frames in the application and press the button "Calcul".Get the "Server answer" (16 bytes) and copy it in SENDKEY_BUILT_BY_SERVER. Then press the button "Transmit Server Answer"
1) !! Check that you have access rights to the application "Pairing using DDT2000" on https://gco.intra.renault.fr:14053/gco/ctrl/login
6) If the HFM is SA unlocked for ECM pairing then put the Ignition Power Supply OFF, select "startRoutine" and press the button "Authorize ECM pairing"
7) If the authorization to pair is TRUE, then switch Ignition Power Supply ON. If the ECM is paired, procedure exit is automatic.
8) To postpone the authorization to pair the ECM, press the button

Screen.Name: Factory Genesis HFM and CIDs PAIRING_SP

Label.Text: FACTORY IN LINE : GENESIS HFM and Customer IDs pairing
2) If the GENESIS MODE is launched, then present a blank customer ID to immo antenna ( to check that the customer ID is blank, press the button"CID blanking check"
3) Press the button "CID pairing" (VSC1 or VSC2 Customer ID pairing) for each customer ID to pair
4) If the customer ID is paired, then insert a new customer ID in the reader and press "CID pairing"
5) Once all the customer IDs are paired, read the APV code and keep the value.
AFTER SALES HFM or Customer IDs pairing
Complete the "After Sales Code" (16 bytes) and press the button "ENTER AFTER SALES MODE"
If the AFTER SALES MODE for HFM is launched, put a CID belonging to the vehicle in the reader then
Press the button "CID PAIRING" for each CID to pair
Once all CIDs are paired, select "Validate" and press the button "EXIT AFTER SALES MODE"
Press the button "HFM PAIRING" to pair the HFM
If the HFM is paired, the EXIT of the AFTER SALES MODE is automatic. Then launch again the AFTER SALES MODE to do the pairing of all customers IDs
If the AFTER SALES MODE for CID is launched, put the CID to pair in the reader then

Input.DataName: After Sales Code MSB to LSB

Label.Text: 3) Complete the "After Sales Code" (16 bytes) and press the button "ENTER ECM AFTER SALES MODE"
4) If the authorization to pair ECM is OK, set Ignition ON. Once paired, exit of the ECM AFTER SALES MODE is automatic
1) Put Ignition ON and check that the ECM is blank
To Cancel the authorization to pair the ECM, press the button "EXIT ECM AFTER SALES PAIRING"

Input.DataName: After Sales Code MSB to LSB

Label.Text: 3) Complete the "After Sales Code" (16 bytes) and press the button "ENTER ESCL AFTER SALES MODE"
4) If the authorization to pair the ESCL is OK, put Ignition ON. Once the ESCL is paired, the exit of the ESCL AFTER SALES MODE is automatic
1) Put Ignition ON and check that the ESCL is blank
To Cancel the authorization to pair the ESCL, press the button "EXIT ESCL AFTER SALES PAIRING"

Input.DataName: After Sales Code MSB to LSB
